title: Dealer Inventory Scraper Input
description: Configure which dealers to scrape and optionally filter the results.

dealers.title: Dealers to scrape
dealers.description: Leave empty to scrape ALL 6 dealers. Or enter one or more dealer name keywords (e.g. ['Walker', 'Serra']) to scrape only those.

condition.title: Vehicle condition
condition.description: Filter by new, used, or all vehicles.

make.title: Make filter
make.description: Optional: filter by make (e.g. 'Chevrolet', 'GMC', 'Buick'). Leave blank for all makes.

model.title: Model filter
model.description: Optional: filter by model keyword (e.g. 'Silverado', 'Tahoe'). Leave blank for all models.

minYear.title: Minimum year
minYear.description: Optional: only include vehicles from this year or newer.

maxYear.title: Maximum year
maxYear.description: Optional: only include vehicles from this year or older.

minPrice.title: Minimum price ($)
minPrice.description: Optional: only include vehicles at or above this price.

maxPrice.title: Maximum price ($)
maxPrice.description: Optional: only include vehicles at or below this price.
